micro.whyThisCaseMatters: The cycle illustrates how therapeutically relevant concepts can become structurally adjacent through intermediate design and activity terms before one consolidated label dominates.
micro.whatItDoesNotProve: It does not prove causal diffusion, intent, or a single historical route of integration.

meso.whatRankingSupports: Ranking competitiveness supports the claim that topology-derived boundary candidates can surface useful early bridge signals near the top of a list.
meso.whyInterpretabilityMatters: Representative cycles make the ranked output readable and debatable, rather than only score-based.

macro.interpretation: Read together, these indicate whether a year is boundary-heavy (many unresolved loops) or closure-heavy (more local filling-in).
macro.warning: These are yearly topology-derived summaries, not the same-loop identity tracked across years.
